# Vertex AI Documentation

## Overview
"Vertex AI is a machine learning (ML) platform that lets you train and deploy ML models and AI applications"

## Core Capabilities
- Gemini (multimodal generative AI model)
- Generative AI access and Model Garden
- Model training and MLOps tools

## Major Product Categories
- Vertex AI Training (serverless, clusters, Ray integration, Slurm orchestration)
- AutoML for tabular and image data
- Inference and deployment tools
- Feature Store and Model Registry
- Pipelines and experiments

## Additional Components (refreshed 2026-04-10)
- Vector Search (versions 1.0 and 2.0)
- Neural Architecture Search
- Ray on Vertex AI
- Dedicated/private endpoints
- Private Service Connect (PSC)
- Vertex AI Workbench
- Colab Enterprise
- Jupyter notebooks
- BigQuery integration
- Cloud Storage connectivity
- Data labeling services
- Model Monitoring
- Explainable AI (interpretability — deprecated March 2026)
- TensorBoard (performance tracking)
- Vertex AI Experiments
- Deep Learning Containers
- Custom training pipelines
- Hyperparameter tuning
- Distributed training
- Model co-hosting
- Codey for code generation
- Imagen for image generation
- Extensions framework
- Generative AI Evaluation Service
- Vertex AI Studio interface
- Flex Start VMs and Spot VMs for training
- Cloud TPU VM support
- Document AI and Healthcare APIs
- Enterprise Knowledge Graph
- Dialogflow for conversational AI
- Contact Center solutions

## Last Fetched
2026-04-10
